title: Academic credentials and early career

title: Awards and recognition spanning three decades
summary: From early-career federal awards through national academy elections, the recognition trajectory demonstrates sustained excellence.

title: Research productivity and scholarly influence
summary: Sustained research excellence demonstrated through publications, citations, patents, and mentorship outcomes.
